title: Nutri Gainz
description: A nutrition tracker website that allows user to look for a food and it's nutrient contents, which includes the number of calories, protein, carbs, and fats.

title: Lifters Paradise
description: A workout logger in which users can login and/or register for an acoount to track the exercises they are doing with the number of weights, sets, repetitions, and rate of perceived exertion the user is doing

title: Leisurely Slackers
description: A travelling website in which users can view different destinations around the world, add or delete a review of the hotels the user has been to, and update any bars the user has been to as well.

title: Mortal Tic-Tac-Toe
description: A brutal tic-tac-toe game where a video displays of a fatality win for when Scorpion wins and for when Sub-Zero wins. No video is played when there is a tie.
